title: The Cowboy Star
writer: Frances Guihan, Frank Melford, Cornelius Reese
actors: Charles Starrett, Iris Meredith, Si Jenks
plot: Tired of being a cowboy movie star, Yorke quits the movies and buys a ranch so he can be a real cowboy. But just as in his films trouble arrives. This time it's bank robber Sampson and his two cronies.
